title: phlox woodhousei
intro: Phlox woodhousei is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polemoniaceae, commonly known as the phlox or Jacob's ladder plant. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phlox woodhousei include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Phlox woodhousei can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
